It fires a curated library of attack payloads — covering prompt injection, goal hijacking, data exfiltration, privilege escalation, and more — directly at your agent's HTTP endpoint and reports every signal it finds.

items.name: hero-ui-mcp
items.description: We often attempt to use a variety of component libraries to streamline our development process, but we can feel overwhelmed when we face with numerous APIs and documents. However, imagine if your AI Agent can find the exact component you need and generate high quality code by reading the latest documentation based on your prompt.
